=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts(4,30): suggestion TS377014: This generator returns an Effect-able value directly, which produces a nested `Effect<Effect<...>>`. If the intended result is the inner Effect value, `return yield*` represents that form. effect(returnEffectInGen)
/.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts(11,13): error TS377006: This Effect never succeeds; using `return yield*` preserves a definitive generator exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
/.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts(18,9): error TS377006: This Effect never succeeds; using `return yield*` preserves a definitive generator exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
/.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts(19,9): error TS377006: This Effect never succeeds; using `return yield*` preserves a definitive generator exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)


==== /.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts (4 errors) ====
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    
    export const shouldNotComplain = Effect.gen(function*() {
        if (Math.random() < 0.5) return Effect.succeed(42)
                                 ~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377014: This generator returns an Effect-able value directly, which produces a nested `Effect<Effect<...>>`. If the intended result is the inner Effect value, `return yield*` represents that form. effect(returnEffectInGen)
        return yield* Effect.fail("no.")
    })
    
    export const shouldComplain = (n: number) =>
        Effect.gen(function*() {
            if (n === 0) {
                yield* Effect.fail("no zero!")
                ~~~~~
!!! error TS377006: This Effect never succeeds; using `return yield*` preserves a definitive generator exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
            }
            return n / 1
        })
    
    export const shouldComplainOther = (n: number) =>
        Effect.gen(function*() {
            yield* Effect.interrupt
            ~~~~~
!!! error TS377006: This Effect never succeeds; using `return yield*` preserves a definitive generator exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
            yield* Effect.die("lol")
            ~~~~~
!!! error TS377006: This Effect never succeeds; using `return yield*` preserves a definitive generator exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
            return n / 1
        })
    
    export const shouldNotComplainThrows = Effect.gen(function*() {
        throw yield* Effect.fail(42)
        return 42
    })
    
    export const shouldNotComplainEventually = Effect.eventually(
        Effect.gen(function*() {
            if (Math.random() < 0.5) {
                return yield* Effect.fail("Not ready")
            }
            return 42
        })
    )
